Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
The name of the victory condition (which is to trigger the doomsday weapon associated with players current tech - example could be to burn the entire planet).
Players can win this game by triggering the Doomsday Weapon associated with their Secret Technology.
Ten typ rozgrywki można wygrać, uaktywniając broń zatraty związaną z odpowiednią tajną technologią.
The generic description about doomsday victory condition.
To cancel the impending victory of {STR_Player}, you need to capture one of their sectors that contains one of the three Doomsday structures.
Aby uniemożliwić zwycięstwo graczowi {STR_Player}, musisz zdobyć jeden z należących do niego sektorów, w których znajduje się jedna z trzech budowli zatraty.
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
You have reached maximum Doomsday Level!
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
You will win a Doomsday victory in {INT_Turns}[turn/]
Liczba tur do twojego zwycięstwa przez zatratę – {INT_Turns}[turn/]
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
{STR_Player} will win a Doomsday Victory in {INT_Turns}[turn/]
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
{STR_Player} is priming their ultimate Doomsday Weapon!
Gracz {STR_Player} przygotowuje swoją ostateczną broń zatraty!
Possible gender specific text required. This text is replicated. When updating text here make sure to update text in the other secret tech docs.
To protect your allied victory you need to help {STR_Player} defend the three Doomsday structures.
{STR_Player} potrzebuje twojej pomocy, by obronić trzy budowle zatraty i zwycięstwo przymierza.

In the text below, text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
